description_long: This is a metallic, single-seat Soviet-era fighter jet with a streamlined fuselage and swept-back low-mounted wings. The aircraft features a silver-gray body with red star insignias on the wings and fuselage, and a bold red lightning bolt design on the vertical stabilizer. The nose is rounded and painted with a red ring, while the cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy positioned just behind the nose. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all swept back to match the wing design. The jet engine intake is located at the front, and the exhaust is at the rear, with no visible landing gear in the current configuration.
description: A silver-gray Soviet fighter jet with swept-back wings, red star insignias, and a red lightning bolt on the tail. Features an enclosed cockpit and prominent front air intake.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, red star insignias, and the red lightning bolt on the tail.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the swept-back wings, cockpit canopy, and the red star and number markings on the fuselage.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded nose with red ring, central air intake, and the symmetry of the wings and tail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the tail's lightning bolt, swept-back wings, and the cockpit's placement behind the nose.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted jet engine with intake at the nose.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and swept horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; configuration cannot be determined from images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
